_comment: Minimal seed library for Stage 11 drill suggestions (targeted practice for weak structural properties). Each problem is tagged with the Stage 3 property/value combination it best isolates. Statements are original/paraphrased, not copied from any specific judge.

problems.title: Minimum Capacity to Ship Packages Within D Days
problems.statement: Packages with given weights must ship in order over D days, one load per day up to a capacity limit. Find the minimum capacity that still finishes within D days.

problems.title: Minimum Eating Speed
problems.statement: Given piles of bananas and H hours, find the minimum constant eating speed so all piles are finished within H hours.

problems.title: Maximum Non-Overlapping Intervals
problems.statement: Given a set of intervals, select the maximum number that don't overlap.

problems.title: 0/1 Knapsack
problems.statement: Given item weights/values and a capacity, choose a subset (each item used at most once) maximizing value without exceeding capacity.

problems.title: Minimum Coins to Make Amount
problems.statement: Given coin denominations and a target amount, find the fewest coins that sum to it exactly (or report impossible).

problems.title: Pair Sum in a Sorted Array
problems.statement: Given a sorted array, find two elements summing to a target using a two-pointer scan.

problems.title: Longest Increasing Subsequence
problems.statement: Given an array, find the length of the longest strictly increasing subsequence.

problems.title: Word Break
problems.statement: Given a string and a dictionary of words, determine if the string can be segmented into a space-separated sequence of dictionary words.

problems.title: N-Queens Placement Count
problems.statement: Count the number of ways to place N queens on an N×N board so none attack each other.

problems.title: Course Schedule Feasibility
problems.statement: Given courses with prerequisite pairs, determine whether it's possible to finish all courses (i.e. the prerequisite graph has no cycle).

problems.title: Network Delay Time
problems.statement: Given a weighted directed graph and a source node, find the time for a signal to reach every other node (or -1 if impossible).

problems.title: Merge Overlapping Intervals
problems.statement: Given a collection of intervals, merge all overlapping ones and return the resulting non-overlapping set.

problems.title: Longest Substring With At Most K Distinct Characters
problems.statement: Given a string and an integer K, find the length of the longest substring containing at most K distinct characters.

problems.title: Count Islands in a Grid
problems.statement: Given a 2D grid of land/water cells, count the number of connected land regions (4-directionally connected).

problems.title: Subset Sum for n ≈ 40
problems.statement: Given up to ~40 numbers, determine if any subset sums to a target value.

problems.title: Edit Distance
problems.statement: Given two strings, find the minimum number of insert/delete/replace operations to convert one into the other.
